title: ophrys scolopax var. oestrifera
intro: Ophrys scolopax var. oestrifera, also known as Ophrys oestrifera, is a subspecies of the bee orchid, a type of flowering plant that belongs to the orchid family. Traditionally, this plant has been used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Ophrys scolopax var. oestrifera include its potential to aid in the treatment of various conditions such as colds, coughs, and respiratory issues. The herbal preparations of Ophrys scolopax var. oestrifera typically involve using the plant's flowers and roots, which can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions for medicinal purposes.
